description_long: This object is a cylindrical can with a pixelated blue background and a prominent red and white circular graphic on the front, reminiscent of a soda or snack can design. The top of the can is metallic gray with a pull-tab, indicating it is meant to be opened by pulling the tab upwards. Around the sides, there is a vertical white barcode and a rectangular white label with black horizontal lines, likely representing product or nutritional information. The can's surface features a checkered border pattern near the top and bottom edges, adding to its stylized, retro appearance. The overall design is simple yet visually striking, with bold color contrasts and clear, blocky graphics. The can appears to be made primarily of metal, typical for beverage or snack containers, and is likely hollow inside.
description: A blue cylindrical can with a pixelated red and white circular graphic, metallic top with pull-tab, barcode, and label details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue can with a large red and white pixelated circle and checkered border.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a vertical white barcode and part of the red circle graphic.
description_view_2: Another side view featuring the barcode and a white rectangular label with black lines.
description_view_3: Back view highlighting the white label with black lines and a partial view of the red circle graphic.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A white rectangular label with black lines, likely representing nutritional information, is visible on the back side of the can.
